01 / ABOUT

Who I Am

Surendar R S am a full stack and cross-platform mobile developer based in Bengaluru, India. I intern as an App Developer at Trilochana Aerospace & Defence Technologies, building AviaTool — a production Flutter/Firebase MRO app covering engineer check-in/out, tool inventory, calibration alerts, QR attendance, admin reporting, and PDF/CSV export.

Outside aerospace, I ship independent products — AI interview platforms, job portals, salary expense trackers, fitness apps, and book utilities — each from concept to a live deployed URL.

For businesses: I pair development with digital marketing — SEO, Google Business, social setup, and India-ready payment flows (UPI/Razorpay) so your product reaches and converts real customers.

What I Build

01
📱

Mobile Apps (iOS & Android)

Full Stack Web Apps

Need something custom built and deployed? From first brief to live product — let's talk. I handle it all.

06 / HOW IT WORKS

My Process

01
💬

Discovery Call

We discuss your goals, users, timeline, and budget — I ask the right questions to scope the build correctly.

02
🎨

Design & Plan

UI mockups, tech stack selection, Firebase schema design, and a delivery timeline — all agreed upfront.

03
⚡

Build & Ship

Weekly progress updates. You see real working screens, not just promises. Built test-first, deployed on delivery.

04
🚀

Launch & Grow

Deployment, store submission, digital marketing setup — your product live and reaching real customers.

06 / EXPERIENCE

My Journey

Jan 2025 — Present
App Developer — Intern
Trilochana Aerospace & Defence Technologies
I built AviaTool, a production-grade Flutter/Firebase MRO application for aviation maintenance operations. Delivered: role-based login (Engineer/Office Staff), QR attendance scanner, calibration alerts with compliance tracking, admin dashboard with KPI readouts (247 tools tracked), tool check-in/out workflows, PDF/CSV batch export, push notifications, and predictive analytics using linear regression.
